1. Authorization Code Flow

Отримання токену:
Request (Postman OAuth 2.0):
Grant Type: Authorization Code
Auth URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/realms/Rikaenzhela/protocol/openid-connect/auth
Token URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/realms/Rikaenzhela/protocol/openid-connect/token
Client ID: yamashchita
Scope: openid

Response:
{
  "Access_token": "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICJlTXQ3T2FZdDAtRjVZR1NIWkFBRXdzcGlPZzlCU045OC15LXVWdFJNbFZZIn0..ZSpkz21QJrNRuNddg8l7V_HBAUfNyZwitxxQ5-qEc9StwN3gFn7WA40JfEy6JbpRpDoPkCHg9_noQQnrywMfMrpMRLa9U9uAZu1jDpRfeErqhjGXi8Tkzs_6eYEstz0Q1LhdspVTDLSH5t0sQFkBMQd-7KsswcNTDnwq1Ld60ApReUQYSbU9NW0Qia0SpPIkM6KsTdAN5OcW0FiQ37GjFzYpgv1yV4tAZUn3njS6T2j7o8VIaGvZdAOogknAetU5uwjL3E0zmR1JhnRyVUj4pBJcY2pNLZPIsDRlJPafVkim5hhb3-tlGd61E-Nakvx3VBbmS9-XzzjWbDwxpVu9zA",
  "Token Type: Bearer"
  "expires_in": 300,
  "scope": "openid",
}

Запит до API:
GET http://localhost:8000/test

Response:
{
    "message": "ok",
    "received_token": "eyJhbGciOiJSUzI1NiIsInR5cCIgOiAiSldUIiwia2lkIiA6ICJlTXQ3T2FZdDAtRjVZR1NIWkFBRXdzcGlPZzlCU045OC15LXVWdFJNbFZZIn0..ZSpkz21QJrNRuNddg8l7V_HBAUfNyZwitxxQ5-qEc9StwN3gFn7WA40JfEy6JbpRpDoPkCHg9_noQQnrywMfMrpMRLa9U9uAZu1jDpRfeErqhjGXi8Tkzs_6eYEstz0Q1LhdspVTDLSH5t0sQFkBMQd-7KsswcNTDnwq1Ld60ApReUQYSbU9NW0Qia0SpPIkM6KsTdAN5OcW0FiQ37GjFzYpgv1yV4tAZUn3njS6T2j7o8VIaGvZdAOogknAetU5uwjL3E0zmR1JhnRyVUj4pBJcY2pNLZPIsDRlJPafVkim5hhb3-tlGd61E-Nakvx3VBbmS9-XzzjWbDwxpVu9zA"
}

2. Implicit Flow

Отримання токену:
Request (Postman OAuth 2.0):
Grant Type: Implicit
Auth URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/realms/Rikaenzhela/protocol/openid-connect/auth
Token URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/realms/Rikaenzhela/protocol/openid-connect/token
Client ID: yamashchita
Scope: openid

}

3. Password Credentials Flow

Отримання токену:
Request (Postman OAuth 2.0):
Grant Type: Password Credentials
Auth URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/realms/Rikaenzhela/protocol/openid-connect/auth
Token URL: http://127.0.0.1:8080/realms/Rikaenzhela/protocol/openid-connect/token
